title: Junior Business Development Manager at CBRE India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at CBRE India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
